mano_cua.result_summary: 禁用项可通过键盘 Enter 被选中（bug 确认）。键盘方向键导航部分正确（跳过单个禁用项）但多个禁用项时仍会高亮第二个。输入 mich → Down → Enter，禁用的 Michigan 被填入输入框。DOM 确认 li 有 disabled class + opacity:0.4，但 Enter 仍触发选择。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: BUG CONFIRMED AGAIN! After pressing Down arrow (which showed no highlight on Michigan, the disabled item) and then pressing Enter: The input field now shows 'Michigan' - the disabled item was SELECTED via keyboard Enter! The dropdown has closed. The text was set to 'Michigan' even though it is a disabled item. This is a verified bug: Arrow key navigation behavior correctly does NOT highlight/visually focus disabled items, BUT Enter key behavior ignores disabled state and selects disabled items anyway.
